title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
